prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约12613名→12957名→12247名→13797名→14358名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2100名；2025年基准位次约14358名；该校在北京市招生计划2021–2023年均为8人，2024–2025年缩减至7人；2026年招生计划大幅扩增至30人，较2025年扩招约328%，为近年最大幅度扩招，显著缓解竞争压力，推动位次大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第107位，排名近年稳定在103–109区间，属中游211院校；该校在近年声誉舆情监测中无显著正面或负面事件记录；抖音学校热度总排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业近年持续高热推荐，计算机类保持推荐热度，对工科考生吸引力较强；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，竞争显著加剧，部分抵消扩招效应；该校校址位于天津。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招约328%（推动位次大幅后移）与北京市考生人数增加约29.7%（加剧竞争、部分抵消扩招效应）两大核心因素，扩招力度远超考生增幅，整体录取难度显著下降；预测2026年最低录取位次约39665名，区间39165–40165名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年河北工业大学在北京市大幅扩招至30人，预测位次约39665名，较2025年大幅后移，录取难度显著下降。位次在预测区间内的考生可将该校作为重点填报目标，以二档专业为主力、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（39165名以内）可重点冲击电气工程及其自动化（卓越工程师）、计算机科学与技术等热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 12613 → 12957 → 12247 → 13797 → 14358, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2100 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14358; the enrollment plan for this university in Beijing was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 7 students from 2024 to 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan significantly expands to 30 students, an increase of about 328% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly alleviating competition pressure and pushing the ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 103–109 range in recent years, belonging to mid-tier 211 universities; the university has no significant positive or negative events recorded in recent reputation monitoring; Douyin university popularity total ranking is 93rd, rated as "average", with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major has been consistently highly recommended in recent years, Computer Science maintains recommendation popularity, attracting strong interest from engineering candidates; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 84900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect; the university is located in Tianjin.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of the 2026 enrollment plan significantly expanding by about 328% (pushing the ranking far back) and the increase in Beijing candidates by about 29.7% (intensifying competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect), the expansion far exceeds the candidate growth rate, significantly reducing overall admission difficulty; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 39665, with a range of 39165–40165.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Hebei University of Technology significantly expands enrollment in Beijing to 30 students, with a predicted ranking of about 39665, a substantial backward shift from 2025, significantly reducing admission difficulty. Candidates within the predicted ranking range can target this university as a key choice, with Tier 2 majors as the main focus, Tier 1 majors for moderate sprinting, and Tier 3 majors for safe backup; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 39165) can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (Excellent Engineer) and Computer Science and Technology.
